reviews.review_text: The staff were very friendly and helpful. The express check was seamless and made arrival hassle free. The ammenities very clean. The onsite coffee was a bonus. Great location with easy access to coolangatta and kirra.

Lovely weekend was had at Kirra Tourist Park.

Greeted by happy smiling faces and directed to a lovely large grassy site (dog friendly). Park is beautifully maintained with gorgeous tall paperbarks lining the roads. Facilities were very clean and well maintained. Plenty for kids to do with pool and jumping pad. Close enough to walk over to Kirra beach.

First weekend out in new van, so when it was discovered I had forgotten gaffer tape, park maintenance were onto it! tape delivered and embarrassing waste water situation averted!

Five Stars to the Kirra Beach Team 👍
Very well maintained park in a great location. Friendly staff, clean amenities and dog friendly. Stayed there 3 times now and will be going back. Would highly recommend a visit.

Great park. Nice big sites, easy to get into. Very clean facilities. Great idea to send email with all codes so you have a seamless entry and exit and you have the codes on you at all times. Look forward to staying in the summer with all the shade. Not too far to walk to beach and shops.

we stayed in our Caravan for 7 days with our dog .staff very helpful ,  &  the amenities are very clean.
the only down side would be traffic noise but doesn't put me off staying again :]

We camped with our camper trailer on a site that was large, clean, shaded and quiet. The amenities were spacious and super-clean. The location was a few minutes walk to Kirra Beach and then the beaut stroll along the coast to Coolangatta. Lots of cafes and restaurants nearby access bus service up anywhere on the Gold Coast. .

Stayed 3 nights here in the lodging rooms.
We had no concerns or issues during our stay.

Camp kitchens had everything we needed.
Lodging rooms are a comfortable space, super affordable.
We were out most the days and come back late afternoon, so was all we needed.
AC in rooms were amazing, cold.

Sunday night - wood fire pizza was amazing.
A walk into town, but nothing drastic. Which was good for us.

Reception staff were great, prime location as keen surfers.

Would 100% stay here again.

I am updating my review because I was disappointed to see aspects of my experience publicly described in a way that does not reflect the call as I experienced it.

I was very dissapointed with Kirra Tourist Parks reception.

At no point during the conversation was I offered alternative dates, lodge combinations, or camping sites as suggested in the google review response. I had explained that our family was flexible and happy to pay for multiple rooms if needed; our main priority was simply securing accommodation.
Unfortunately I found the phone manner abrupt and dismissive. I did not feel listened to, was spoken over multiple times, and ultimately the call ended before my enquiry could properly be discussed. The interaction left me feeling as though my enquiry was burdensome rather than welcomed.

What disappointed me most was the public response suggesting options had been offered and declined, as that was not the case or conversation at all.

We had previously stayed at the park in our mobile home for a period of 3.5 weeks in summer 2025, under my partners name (I am hesitant to give details) we would have been open to a variety of accommodation options, including powered or unpowered sites if available. Not our preferred option as our bikes & trailers were stolen overnight last stay. Instead, we ended up booking elsewhere and received a much warmer and more accommodating experience.
I hope this feedback is taken constructively, as reception staff create the first impression of the park and play a major role in how guests feel treated.

Great! Friendly service, large sites, clean and plentiful amenities, lots of shady trees. Fabulous location - a short stroll to Kirra beach, to Kirra shops, to Coolangatta. An even shorter stroll to bus stops,
We camp with tent set up  been a great location with top class amenities very friendly safe place to stay we will be back
Its an ok caravan park, nice and clean. Just not into the shanty town people being just over the back. Waking up to petrol bombs was definitely an experience.

Just had an awesome week at this park in Kirra.
The location was perfect, more importantly the Park was nothing short of wonderful.
Everything was spotless and we had the best site to put our Motorhome on.
We will certainly be back.
Have stayed numerous times. Both in a pet friendly cabin and a caravan. The amenities and park are always well kept. Very close to the beach!

Only comment.. Allow the kid to order coffee at the Cafe for parents.. not selling coffee to my 14 year daughter and making stop packing up to join her to get served is a joke.. apart from that 5 stars

Great site as well as big. All the staff are helpful, engaging and ready to get stuck in. Good amenities, good sized sites so you're not struggling to get the car in next to the van. Walking distance to the beach.

We were extremely happy with our Caravan stay at Kirra Beach, even though the weather was unpredictable and raining on and off we were able to enjoy the beach and surrounding areas which are close by.
The park is well set out with clean amenities and the booking in was so easy, friendly and helpful.
We took our little dog for his first try camping and were impressed by all dog owners adhering to the dogs on leash rules.
Perfect spot to either relax or enjoy the beach and cafe’s in Kirra.
Look forward to returning.
On arrival office staff not welcoming at all ,ground staff very approachable and very very helpful. Amenities are dated not very clean.

We have stayed here several times in both the cabins and in tents. Close by there are a ton of eateries between Kirra Beach and Coolangatta as well as the famous Twin Towns RSL. Staff have always been friendly and helpful, and the amenities have always been clean and presentable. Kids love the pool and the jumping pillow in the playground. There's a pool table and table tennis with a big TV in the rec room and a really great camp kitchen. While it can be a decent walk to shops and eateries the drive is fairly quick. We like it because its a short drive to some of the best surf beaches in Australia like Greenmount, Snapper Rocks and Duranbah Beach.
Beautiful, quiet park in a great location. Staff are friendly and helpful. Will definitely return!
Great holiday.  Very good caravan park.  Good sites.

Wonderful Caravan park great location and staff are very friendly. I highly recommend staying for a short or long stay, kid friendly and dog friendly with very well maintained grounds and amenities. I for one will be coming back again
Have been going for years at Xmas and Easter. New managers are very approachable and helpful.
Cracking caravan park. Big sites, clean amenities and the pool was great.

Our caravan group stay here every year.  The park has a pleasant atmosphere, with shady trees and well-maintained sites. Having a lot of trees is a two-edged sword. Like I said, very shady but suggest you bring car covers for the birds that flock above in the branches.  As someone wrote, the beach is a little walk, as are the shops, but when we stayed there, we parked our car, covered it, and never used it the whole week.  The beach and shops are close enough for a good walk.  The new managers are friendly and very helpful. There are plenty of open areas for the kids, young and old, to use, or just to enjoy the space.

Lovely grassy Park with a good size swimming pool as well . Amenities are kept very clean and laundry facilities are good . The park also provides plenty of clothesline space . Great location Being only a few blocks back from Kirra Beach with  an excellent bike and walking track right along the Gold Coast. HAndy to shops, cafes and restaurants as well. The park often has food trucks with different themes on a regular basis, which is great if you don’t feel like cooking or going out. I highly recommend this tourist part!

Had a wonderful stay at Kirra Tourist Park.  A fantastic large dog friendly site. Park kept clean and was nice to ride bike and wander around the green space. The communication on what was on at the Park was great as well as making sure everyone's experience was enjoyable.
Definitely be back again. So close to Kirra and Coolangatta then straight on hwy to head north or back south.

A great park to stay in, spacious van sites with ample shade from established trees. Admin and grounds staff very helpful. Location close to beach, shops and cafes. Easy access from the motorway. Amenities in need of refurbishing however clean and tidy!
Great place for Easter thanks to the great new managers so friendly keep up the awsum atmosphere! See you Easter 2027 The Dyson’s

It’s a lovely location and a decent park, but you need to do more about security. A private patrol (as some other parks have) would not hurt. We had 2 bikes stolen using bolt cutters, and management were not at all surprised or particularly helpful with the investigation.
Great Caravan park. Roomy powered sites and dog friendly. Great amenities also. We had a great holiday there. 😊

Kirra Beach TP is our go to place to stay when on the Gold Coast.  The location is perfect.  Close to beaches, restaurants, shopping etc.  The staff are friendly and helpful and the park is clean and tidy.   We also love that you get can pizza, mexican etc from vans that are onsite almost nightly in the park.  You can relax, have a few drinks and not worry about driving to get takeaway!

Great pet friendly park, a 5 minute walk to the beach and great cafes
Very well looked after gardens and lovely safe atmosphere

Just stayed at Kirra beach tourist park for a week. We stayed in a pet friendly cabin which is a home away from home. The park is a lovely place to stroll around and enjoy the peace and beautiful trees.
The food trucks in the evening are a treat.
All the staff are helpful and friendly.
We are planning our next holiday.

Spent 10days in the dog friendly section. Lovely and quiet with clean amenities and surroundings. A lovely pool and laundry facilities were great.

The park was close to the beach, shops, restaurants and clubs so you didn’t have to travel too far. Kirra Beach was also a great swim. We certainly will be returning one day!

The food trucks were also a bonus

We camped here for the weekend, it was the most relaxed we have been out of all our camp trips. Friday night was loaded fries food van and it was absolutely delish, it made a long day enjoyable walking to the food truck and getting a yummy dinner.

The pool looked amazing but we didn’t get a chance to get in it. The amenities and park were clean. The site felt spacious.

We really loved our stay at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. Darren, Natasha and the whole team were friendly and welcoming. The whole team went out of their way to make our stay wonderful. We stayed for three weeks and the staff were always stopping by to say hello and the team helped us with a few issues we had. Over and above what was expected in service. Thanks team.
A well equipped dog friendly tourist park - good location with clean well maintained facilities.

We were on a site that was great in size and easy to reverse the caravan. Most of the sites are large in size and there was  good access to grassed areas to sit down to enjoy.
Amenities were great and staff gave excellent service.

Loved our trip here! It’s about a 10-minute walk to the beach and nearby coffee shops, even with kids in a beach trolley. Just a 5-minute walk further and you reach North Kirra Beach, which is dog-friendly (dogs must be on leash at all times and kept at least 200 m away from the flagged swimming area).

The pool was great, although there isn’t really a shallow area apart from the small steps. Facilities were good — clotheslines and laundry available. The ladies’ bathrooms were clean and had lovely hot showers.
Super warm & welcoming.Great spot for the kids & dogs too. Close to the beach. We had a great stay. Thank you :)

Having a dog does make finding accommodation challenging. We often stay in Airbnb’s but frankly we most often find them disappointing. Often lingering odours of previous pet guests. Our daughter found Kirra Tourist Park for us on line and we were surprised and delighted. The cabin was well located,  well appointed and pristine. The entire park and it facilities were exceptionally clean and well cared for. A testament to management and their team. If you are looking for pet friendly accommodation at the Gold Coast this is the place to stay.
We have stayed twice now and have thoroughly enjoyed it, a lovely park to stay, we will be back!

We enjoyed everything about our stay here, including the country feel, the immaculate facilities and friendly staff. Just a short walk to great cafes and restaurants. Our dogs were welcomed and the best thing was the free professional self serve dog wash.

Awesome stay. Definitely coming back! Natasha and Darren, Managers, wonderful and knowledgeable although they are TITAN supporters! Very clean amenities. Grounds maintained beautifully. Food trucks visit. Dog friendly, close to everything. Very friendly and welcoming stay. 10/10

We just spent 5 nights at Kirra Beach. It was lovely to meet the new Managers, Darren & Natasha, and their staff. We were welcomed by the friendly receptionists and greeted by the maintenance team who are doing an outstanding job. We enjoyed the absolute best pizza on Tuesday night in the park too. The park is looking great after the rain and it’s always a benefit to have new blood with new ideas. Congratulations to all involved.

We’ve stayed here a few times and love it. The staff are extremely friendly and helpful. It’s a great dog friendly park and kept super clean. Amenities are regularly checked and cleaned. It’s everything you want.

We stayed here for 2 nights in a cabin with our 3 children whilst friends of ours were on a powered caravan site with their children.

Our cabin was good, clean, plenty of towels, big fridge, cold AC.

The beach is stunning!!! But too far to walk to with young kids. "Beach" being in the title of their name reads a little slippery. You have a couple of main busy roads to get through to the beach also.

The "lake" (swamp) next to the cabins smells like a sewer.

We were phoned on our 1.5hr drive there on Friday 20th Feb at approx 330pm (post work, fighting traffic with 3 kids under 9 picked up directly from school so we could arrive in a timely manner) by reception demanding immediate credit card payment of the 50% balance owing prior to arrival. Supposidly payment was required by 4pm or we wouldn't be able to check in. We were due to arrive by 430pm. We were actually hoping we could pay in cash when we arrived but this was scoffed at. Cue stress level rise!
I did pay online with CC, however her demanding, unfriendly cold call did not leave a good initial impression of Kirra Beach Tourist Park. Turns out reception closing time was 5pm so not sure what all the fuss was about!

Why does reception close at 5pm in summer on a Friday?
Why are other holiday parks in GC/Qld reception closing at 6pm or later?
Why are your staff phoning patrons, causing stress about prior arrival payments and lying about closing times?

Why does your pool close at 6pm in summer? A quick search shows that many other places pools close at 8-9pm. We were promptly and urgently told to leave the pool at 6pm by a staff member on the Saturday. It was still blisteringly hot and the children were confused as to why they had to leave when the sun was still up.

On check out day Sunday I received a text at 9am advising as a "friendly reminder" that late check out after 10am can result in late fees being charged.

Well thank you for the lovely hospitality and treating patrons as human adults Kirra "Beach" Tourist Park (not). I have travelled extensively during my life and stayed at dozens of hotels/motels/campgrounds and never have I ever received a text message threat of being charged for leaving late when I wasn't planning on leaving late. We were out of there by 0945am and were glad to not see any staff on the way out.

RESPONSE TO KIRRA "BEACH" TOURIST PARK;

I think anyone reading your response can gauge that I am not overreacting to the ick attitude factor of the people running this park.

No google did not adjust my 1 star rating due to being inappropriate, I changed it to a 2 as I felt a little sorry for you and was impressed with your efforts to influence my chosen score.

I also see you have not answered my questions about slack early reception and pool closing hours.

Hopefully your management can adjust and improve its petty snooty culture for your interpersonal challenges moving forward.

The best caravan on the Gold Coast staff are so friendly in the office and advise you everything housekeeping and maintenance always give me a wave and a smile and happy to assist. If you have any queries. The sites  are lovely big and clean and dog friendly 10 out of 10 from us. Tracey & David Guest

Beautiful camping spot at Kirra. Dog friendly , lots of shady trees  and spaced out sites for vans . Clean amenities and friendly staff . Short walk to beach and cafes / restaurants.
We will be back .. thank you for a lovely weekend 🤩🥂

Great location being so close to cafes, shops, restaurants and beaches with a lovely walk along the esplanade.  Easy check in and the sites were very accommodating for large vans.  Plenty of amenities and a tidy well maintained park.

We had the most wonderful three weeks at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. Such a beautiful park to stroll around with the gorgeous paperbark trees and lovely plants and gardens. Fabulous dog friendly site. Wonderful staff. Excellent and well maintained facilities. Great food vans on site various nights of the week which we thoroughly enjoyed. Beautiful pool. Dog wash facilities and treats for our black lab Duke whenever we visited reception. Thanks sincerely Natasha, Dean and all your staff who made our stay so memorable. We will be back and we will recommend your park highly to fellow travellers on our adventures around Australia 😊

We had a wonderful stay in our caravan at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. The staff are so friendly, always say hi and happy to have a chat. The grounds are immaculate with clean facilities and nice grassy sites. Will definitely stay there again

Stayed here at Kirra a few times now.
A really nice and well managed park.
Friendly staff and nice facilities.
Pool was super clean and great for a late after Refresh.
Beautiful spot and great location. Close to the beach and other amenities. The staff were fantastic and very helpful.

Claims to be close to beach but it’s a good walk across a main road. The beach is a very long walk on the sand then finally water. Pool at park is great though. No beaches close by are dog friendly. All signs are very clear, no dogs allowed. Sites are ok but ours had a strange odour. Shops and cafes are a very limited med selection and some distance away! The park does offer some food vans on certain days which is nice. Make sure for you dog owners you use your free token for the dog wash. We spent 10 days at the park so got to know it pretty well.
Lady was extremely rude and unprofessional, definitely the last resort type of place
Parents in law stayed here on a powered site , they said it was lovely , camping in a van under some gum trees and paperbarks 🙌🏼
The park was very well maintained and the staff very friendly and helpful.  We stayed in a cabin which was very nice and clean.  The park is only a couple blocks from the esplanade.
The staff were very accommodating to my needs. And the facilities were clean .
Great park. Very large sites. Food vans at night. Great location walking distance to Kirra and Coolangatta.  Will be back

I am very rarely moved to post a review let alone a negative one but the staff on duty at reception between 12.30 and 1.00 on 14/2/26 were unhelpful in regards to sites and pricing in that we were sent around an inspection of unavailable sites reception resenting that we wanted some idea of prices, didn't volunteer potential sites prior to us walking all around the half empty sites and a second receptionist on our return was very peremptory in informing us that the sites we had chosen were gone. Her distainful and unfriendly attitude causing us to leave without further enquiry.

Usually love this park but had a recent disappointing experience. The camp sites were emptying and we asked for a few extra hours for after check out on Australia Day, but were quoted a $60 half-day rate just to keep our tent up on an empty patch of grass. Inflexible solutions, poor customer service and strange policies.

Un safe
No management of safety problems
Poor staff response and 0 assistance in light of any park failures.

Theft, domestic violence and fire/stolen cars in 10 days. Better off ANYWHERE else.
Buon posto dove stare.. molto professionale

Superb location. Wonderful spacious sites. Great management team & staff - thank you Simon & Jo.|Facilities clean, gardens & sites well maintained. Good value for money. Excellent swimming pool again lovely & clean. We'll be back again soon.

I loved the location and environment which was surprisingly natural. Great amenities, kitchen, laundry, pool and rec room. Very considerate staff and short walk to the beach and North Kirra Beach and boardwalk, we will be coming back

From the moment we arrived, Simon and Jo made us feel very welcome and Simon even helped us park our van!|The facilities are clean and well maintained. The atmosphere of the park with the lovely trees and well spaced sites is very open and relaxing.|The swimming pool is fantastic and having essentials available for purchase (including hot coffee!) is a real bonus.|We found the location ideal - just a short walk to Kirra Beach and all the cafes and restaurants. |We have booked our second visit already!

We had a great time with the family over the Australia Day weekend with our family pets as well. Fantastic plots to park the vans, easy access and lovely shade trees where we were.!! The grandkids loved the facilities available for them and enjoyed riding bikes and scooters in a safe environment. Well done to the staff, the amenities were always clean. Loved our time at this park.!!

Perfect location within a 5-10 minute walk to some great cafes, restaurants and the beautiful Kirra beach!  The facilities at the park were very good. - clean bathrooms, crystal clear pool, loads of shady trees, convenient store /office and food vans while we were there!  Our first time at this park & we will definitely visit again!

We have stayed here a few times now. We have loved all our experiences here. The managers and staff are friendly and helpful. The park is kept clean even through the busy times. The sites are spacious and the best part is we can have our dog there.

A 5 minute walk to the beach was amazing for sunset walks and was close to coffee shops.

The staff were friendly and welcoming and gave recommendations on things to do and places to eat.

Our site plot was huge which gave us lots of space. Our site also overlooked the gold coast airport which meant we had a perfect viewing take off spot. ( planes stopped around 9pm so this didn’t keep us awake).

The food trucks was also a nice touch.

The loss of 1 star was due to wifi being intermittent and lack of pathways to access the amenities which lead a 4-5 min walk to get there in the dark.

Overall, we would stay here again.

I visited Kirra Beach Tourist Park as a guest of a guest and was there long enough to feel comfortable leaving a review. To be clear, I did not personally book or stay overnight at the park, so there will understandably be no record of my name against a booking. My review is based purely on time spent on site as a visitor.

My family comes here every year as an end of year trip and they absolutely love it. They caravan, which clearly suits the park well. Caravan holidays just are not really my thing, although my folks are always encouraging me to look into the cabins and other accommodation options instead.

For the length of stay I would have wanted, I had already pre booked a room at the Rydges down the road during a Black Friday sale, which ended up being much more my speed and better value for what I personally look for in accommodation. That comparison is obviously subjective, but worth mentioning for anyone weighing up options.

The location itself is a strong point. The park is close to several beaches, shops, and local amenities, which makes getting around easy and convenient without needing to travel far.

It is an older park, and while it is generally functional, it does feel like it could benefit from a short period of closure to properly fix, service, or update some of the infrastructure. The showers, in particular, 100% need an upgrade, and small things like outdoor taps and shared facilities also stood out as areas that could use attention to keep everything running smoothly.

One thing I did notice while on site was a persistent smell that I could not quite put my finger on. It was not overpowering, but it was noticeable at times. Aircraft noise is present during the day, with planes being quite loud when flying overhead, though they did appear to shut down at night, or at least significantly reduce, based on my time there. That is not the fault of the park, just the reality of the location near the airport.

Another point worth mentioning is the presence of a homeless tent city directly behind the park, visible from the highway. I did not personally experience any incidents, but it is noticeable and may raise safety or comfort concerns for some families, particularly those with young children.

We also had an incident where my niece cut her foot on broken glass while playing. From conversations with others, it sounds like this is not entirely uncommon, likely due to some younger visitors partying. Given how family focused the park is, it would be reassuring to see more frequent checks and clean ups of shared areas.

On the positive side, this place is an absolute paradise for kids. There is plenty of space to run around, play, and swim, and it is easy to see why families return year after year.

Overall, it is a well suited park for families and caravanners, just not really my cup of tea.
Great location great views beaches plenty of room for kids to roam around. Friendly helpful staff

Do close to the beach. Perfect for our holiday.
Everything we needed.

We stayed at this caravan park and really enjoyed our time and the park. It’s in a great location away from the crowds but easy walk to everything. The caravan sites are a great size so you are not on top of your neighbours. We will definitely go again

Great service from the managers, open space,  good caravan sites, grounds tidy. Amenities clean but dated.
Short flat walk to the beach.

The amenities were clean and tidy as was the all park facilities.
We would certainly recommend the caravan park for grey nomads

An awesome park to stay at! The facilities are first class, the location is excellent and the staff are very friendly. I would highly recommend anybody to stay here on there next visit to this part of our wonderful country.

The place is close to an airport and the sound is so uncomfortable, there is nothing natural in it as you can hear the cars driving on the highway almost all the night. They empty the trash bins everyday and it is so loud. Overpriced.
There is nothing worthy about this place.
At summer there are so many bugs, there aren’t any in winter but it is so cold though.

Not suitable for tents at all. Maybe if you have a van, but still have to ignore all the machines around you.

*Update as a reply to the response from the owner:  Dear person who thinks they are a genius, the reservation was made by my Partner,  hence  you do not have any booking in my name. do not try to be deceptive. work on solving your issue and lowering your unreasonable prices for people instead.

Fantastic location, clean cabins, value for money and staff were so polite and welcoming. Not only would I recommend Kirra Beach Tourist Park to everyone, but we will be back again in the very near future.

This park is dog friendly.  Moden upmarket amenities very clean and smell lovely. Grounds kept neat and tidy. Staff very friendly and even the dog was allowed in the office. Easy access to lots of rubbish bins. Food truck friday and saturday night for those that didnt want to cook. Very quite and peacefull even though it was a weekend. Highly recommended.

Great well maintained park and it’s dog friendly! Staff were very welcoming to both fiancé and our fur baby who was spoilt with a treat and a friendly pat on arrival at reception. Looking forward to coming back again.

An absolutely fantastic stay at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. The cabin was spotless and comfortable. The facilities throughout the park top notch and well maintained. But what truly made our stay exceptional was the amazing staff. They were warm, welcoming and always ready to help with anything needed. We'll definitely be back.

stayed for 26 nights - the good: large park in great location, pool is heated.
the bad: large gaps in shower doors, shower benches too small for belongings, showers go cold/hot randomly for long periods, divider between shower and dry area tiny so all your stuff gets wet, no larger showers for families, no walkways through sites from back of park to get to amenities, kids playground very basic (no slide or swings, pool table ripped and cue tips broken (still costs money to play though), smallest washing machines I’ve ever seen and not enough of them for size of park, dryer costs $9 an hour, our site was not mowed in the 26 days we stayed, became very overgrown, poor drainage in park and roads become flooded, 1 female staff member in office is very rude (unsure of name), no light at dump point

Amazing for family and really good location.
Great to ride a bike ❤️
2 night minimum, ridicoulous, spending our money somwehre else

This is am awesome park to stay. Right from checking in at office we felt welcomed. We have recently stayed in a cabin which was perfect.very clean and everything as we required.
The sites here are large and close to amenities.
The pool,bbq areas and laundry are kept in immaculate condition.
Pizza van  presented beaut pizzas ,good value for $ however I would give the Mexican van a big miss for number of reasons.
Thoroughly reccommend this gem of a park.

We have stayed at Kirra beach tourist park several times. The amenities block always spotless. Lots of shade with trees filled with heaps of birds. Walking distance to Kirra beach. Great location. The staff in reception were very helpful when i had to email some forms.

The staff are very friendly and the park's facilities are excellent. We are repeat customers. The best pet friendly park on the Gold Coast. Short walk to the beach and local cafes. We love staying here. Sean and Cathy.
Brilliant location. Friendly helpful staff. Highly recommended for a getaway!!
Affordable park close to beach
Great sites, friendly staff. Will definately be back.

Wonderful place to stay, close to all facilities.
Walking distance to beach, shops and cafes.
Friendly staff.
Great Tourist Park excellent location & clean well kept facilities
Have stayed here each time we come to the Gold Coast. Great location excellent staff. Grounds well maintained. Looking forward to our next stay
Great staff excellent ground maintenance fantastic location
Great park. Dog friendly sites and grounds maintained well considering how dry it is. Staff all friendly and helpful.
Had a site and the location is great
great park , Dog friendly plenty of shade . coffee in reception great idea . They were fully booked but managed to find us a spot for our 20ft van . very happy with our stay .
Love this place, my favourite place on the coast! Staff are friendly and its just easy there. We hate packing up leaving, as soon as we leave we miss this place. Can't wait to go back.

I recently stayed at Kirra Beach Tourist Park for a week. The staff there were so friendly and accommodating. The location is amazing, good facilities, clean rooms and amenities. I'll definitely be back.

We recently stayed at Kirra Beach Tourist Park and absolutely loved our time there! The staff were so lovely and welcoming, and our site was a great size—clean and well-maintained. The amenities were spotless, and the park itself is in such a great spot, just a short trip to the beach. There were plenty of fun things for the kids to do, plus great holiday activities that kept everyone happy. We’ll definitely be back—and next time, we’ll be staying even longer!

– Nicky & Darren Godbee
Stayed in our van.  Excellent  surroundings .beach in   close vicinity.
I just love this place
We were in a caravan

Great park, lovely friendly staff, great location, clean and lots of fun activities for families, were staying in the dog friendly area and there is so much room on each site , beautiful shady trees around , very quiet, great seeing lots of happy kids having fun, fellow campers very friendly too.
Highly recommend it.
Amazing
3rd visit, looking forward to the 4th

Amazing. Huge powered sites. Very friendly staff. Best park l have been to. I have stayed at a lot off parks. Dog friendly. Almost everyone abides by the rules. Very quiet  apart from the odd plane taking off. But overall excellent
Powered caravan site. Lovely big trees and quiet part from the occasional plane taking off from the GC airport.

Well was a bit disappointing.
Arrived with no advice that major 3 day road works were being done only to be told we sent you an email.( day work started)
Crazy loud and smell of diesel drove 3 caravans to leave around us.
We kept busy and away during the day during the works .
Everything settled down after that so a nice time was had as the Park has reasonable facilities for all to enjoy.
Lovely park. Very clean and tidy.

Thank you to the amazing team at Kirra Beach tourist Park for an awesome weekend away. The amenities are extremely clean and regularly cleaned. The location is just an easy walk to the beach and cafes in kirra or Coolangatta. The team at the park are the friendliest people going around, they seem to love what they do and they absolutely adore dogs! My dogs were so spoilt with treats and pats. There are lots of very well thoughtful touches for our furry friends. The pool was heated and the food van, that varied each night, was a superb idea.
Such a great find and we will definitely be back for longer than a weekend.
Cheers, Lizzy
Great facilities to keep kids safe and entertained.  Dog friendly options. Plenty of space. The facilities immaculate. Will definitely come again.
Great park for kids and adults. Pet friendly

Stayed in a caravan at the facility. Site clean and tidy, easy access with good shade from some lovely trees. Amenities clean and tidy and reception and ground staff very friendly, helpful and willing to help. Would definitely recommend and would stay here again.
Great spot a short walk from kirra beach and cafes

We had a lovely stay at Kirra Tourist Park. Amenities were clean, fresh & well maintained. We were warned about the airport noise but we didn’t find that an issue. Just a bit tight getting our van in around the trees. We will be back. Thank you.  Deb K 🌻

We loved staying here! The room was very nice, with a big, comfortable couch, a large dining table, and a full kitchen to use. Heat pumps in each room kept us warm. The beds were comfortable, and the shower was great! We would definitely stay here again. There were only a couple of cons: one, there was some old food stuck to plates, dirty microwave and a few dirty dishes that we had to rewash to use; and two, our booking stated we’d get one room service during the week we stayed, but that didn’t happen, unless I did read it wrong. Luckily, we made good use of the washing machine in the room, so it wasn’t really a big deal for us. We would 100% stay here again!

We came to Kirra to catch some waves and stayed at Kirra tourist park. The park  was very clean and the staff super friendly, love the smiles, keep up the great work. Great location, close to the beach, surf spots, and plenty of shopping options which made our holiday so easy.
We will be back
christian

camping on dirt, near airport can hear planes taking off at all hours, showers freezing not exactly very close to beach

thank you for reaching out but i stayed under different name but yet still had all the same concerns as before.

Not exactly as close to the beach as they described and not very walkable access, better off driving. The tent camps sites are mainly dirt and rocks and the showers are freezing, despite being right next to the airport so all you can hear from waking up to sleeping.

To owner: You have no details of mine because I stayed under my family’s name. Just because you can not find someone’s details dose not mean that didn’t experience this. Our campsite had no grass we were sleeping on dirt and rocks and the showers had no hot water at all. Hope that helps.
Great caravan park, quiet, dog friendly, nice staff, clean amenities, planes might annoy you but otherwise good location.
Nice clean park and facilities. Friendly helpful staff and really good sized sites to fit big vans. We walked to the beach daily and to get groceries.
Great and Pet friendly

Absolutely loved my stay at Kirra Beach Tourist Park over the long weekend during the Cooly Car Show! Despite the park being fully booked, the whole experience was smooth, comfortable, and genuinely enjoyable.

First and foremost – the staff were amazing. Seriously some of the friendliest, chattiest, and most welcoming people I’ve come across at a campsite. They really made my stay feel personal and relaxed, and nothing was too much trouble.

The amenities were spotless – always clean, well-maintained, and the shower pressure was incredible (a big tick after a long day exploring). There’s a pool on-site, perfect for a quick cool-down, plus BBQ areas and a laundry (washers are $5, dryers just $1 for 7 minutes). Super handy when you’re travelling light.

I stayed on both a powered and unpowered site, and each had its own vibe. The unpowered camp kitchen was a standout – equipped with a microwave, kettle, hot tap, sinks, picnic benches and plenty of power points. Everything you need to make van life that bit easier.

The location is a winner – just a short stroll to the beach, shops, cafes and everything Coolangatta has to offer.

Highly recommend this spot, especially if you’re after great service, clean facilities and a beachside base. I’ll definitely be back.

Reception staff fantastic
Powered sites had ample space.
Amenities were spotless
Great place to stay

Jo and the team at Kirra Beach work hard to provide a truly comfortable stay. The amenities are immaculate, and everything is so well-maintained. The staff are friendly, accommodating, and go above and beyond to ensure a wonderful experience.
I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a relaxing getaway close to the beach.
Thanks guys!!
Great friendly caravan park helpful staff excellent location 😀
Relaxed vibe. Close to the beach and pet friendly!

Kirra beach tourist park it a great place for your family and pets
Love it and we will be back

Fantastic park in an awesome location.
Made our life so much easier having a quality caravan park that we could bring our dog along to. The kids play equipment was a huge hit too.
The place was clean and tidy, well kept and the amenities were great. We will definitely be staying here more often.
Takes dogs. Hallelujah not many do. Visitor parking is tough. Under the flightpath but doesn't impact. Kirra beach beautiful but you can't take dogs on beach.

Incredibly accommodating! This was our 3rd stay at the park and ones again got a great caravan spot for our German Shepherd.
We will definitely be back again.
Repeat customers and this time we made a mistake and didn't book our third night. They moved mountains for us and got us in. Thanks guys legends. Cheers Sean and Katie

We Stayed here during the week to be able to get up for the Anzac Dawn service in Currumbin. The park was clean and well maintained. There was a food van and coffee in reception!
Our dog friendly camp site was great.  This is the reason we picked this park.

This was our first time staying at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. The facilities were impeccable! Very clean and well maintained and pet friendly.

The park is fully secure with PIN code access to toilets and boom gates. There was entertainment everyday for the kids such as hair braiding, face painting, temporary tattoos and the food trucks every day were awesome!

Very close to local shops and the beach. Very convenient and awesome park.

We did have an unfortunate issue with dog tokens but the follow up and customer service provided by Scott the GM was amazing! We highly recommend everyone to check out this amazing tourist park!

We stayed here over Easter in our van and couldn't be happier!  A fantastic location close to countless beaches nearby, cafes and local shops/ grocery stores. The park itself was neat, tidy and fun! Nicely mowed often, a fun bouncing pillow for the kids, little playground with climbing frame for kids. Food vans every night was a greaaaat hit for us not having to worry about cooking dinner and good priced. The pool was alright abit cold and no 'toddler section' so parents had to be in but not that big of a deal. Toilets/showers were alright first block the showers were crap with hot water so just went to the other block and was way better. Our site itself was so good with a great cement slab for us!

Older Park.
Old plumbing throughout the park, seems to have issues as subsided road surfaces, pooling water, and leaking water feeds to camp sites.
Many Gum trees on grounds, some overhanging sites.
Needs a revamp of areas of park.
Convenient location to visit local attractions.

We had the best week at this camp site. Staff were soooo friendly  and helpful. A special touch was the food trucks in the evenings.

I don't own a dog....but for doggie lovers, you can take  your dogs with. t Only sad part, is that not all the doggie "owners" picked up their dogs 💩 which was so unpleasant... especially delivered next to our tent or under my shoe.  😫😫😫😫
Please carry your doggie bags and respect  everyone camping 🏕

Keep an eye on your own pooch, and clean up after them 😊

Will definitely  be back. So local to everywhere.

Thank you 😊

Great location
Big sites for vans
Great park.   Lots of space.   Close to 🏖️
Beautiful park and location
Great park, good clean facilities and most importantly there were plenty of toilets and showers.

Goed vakantiepark met prima faciliteiten. De douchehokjes kunnen wel een upgrade gebruiken maar doen het goed.

De speeltuin met springkussen werd goedgekeurd. Locatie is fijn, in 10 minuten lopen op het strand en 25 minuten lopen naar een goede surfspot bij de Pier. Wandeling is fijn.

De prijs van 80 dollar per nacht en minimale verblijf van 2 nachten vond ik minder. Vergeleken met andere vergelijkbare campings elders was dit erg duur.
A bit expensive at $63 / night, power and water. Nice and clean.

Starting to look a tad tired.
And
Expensive too.
Great place to stay we will be back again
Fantastic location and great facilities. I highly recommend to stay here and experience the real Gold Coast without the tourist.

Another wonderful stay at this top class caravan park. Everything is kept clean, especially the facilities & BBQs (normally cook on my own barbie). Spacious sites particularly as we brought our dog this time. Foodie nights including pizza & fish club vans a couple of nights a week. Very well located, walking distance to Kirra & Coolongatta Beaches, surf clubs & Kirra Village Shops. Very helpful staff who took time to help us with an electrical fault with our van. Highly recommended. We'll be back.

2025 01 20-23 Last minute descision to come back to this wonderful caravan park. Love the spacious sites & dog friendly attitude. Very well located for dog walks. Great bakery at Kirra Village. Had to have lunch at North Kirra Surf Life Saving Club again - a must do. Thanks for checking on everyone after Friday mornings fierce storm. Well done guys!
A great place for a holiday, great location and excellent amenities!

I have a service dog and the surcurty guard said no dogs allowed I tried telling him Dusty is my registered service dog license ect and he’s still told me to get out in a very rude way I visit a friend who’s lives here for decades and I’m just sad and shattered I don’t want to come back here again even if my friend owns his own house in this park
Well managed, friendly staff great location. Bit noisy with planes, but it is the area . Will come back again

By far my favorite caravan park on the Gold Coast! The location is perfect, the park is very well kept, amenities always clean, great pool area and an added bonus to have a variety of food trucks each week. Thank you for being dog friendly, it's greatly appreciated! My dog loves all the pat's and treats you give him at reception! The Kirra Beach management and team are 10/10 ! Always happy to help and we are greeted with a warm smile every time! Thanks for being wonderful :)
Absolutely great caravan park, large sites, very clean amenities, very friendly staff.

Do yourself a favour and stop off for a stay at Kirra Beach Tourist Park
Great spot in the perfect location good clean amenities and sites have ample room
We will definitely be back next time we are in the area
Had an issue with our Caravan on Xmas Day and Andrew couldn't do enough to help thanks
We have been here for 10 days and the staff have been awesome
Well done Kirra Beach 3 cheers from us
Thanks again for a great stay

I absolutely loved our stay at Kirra Beach. Easy access to caravan sites. Facilities were so well maintained. Bathrooms, laundry, communal kitchen, bbq areas, and pool. We had friends staying with us and they used a cabin which was beautifully maintained.
I loved the beautiful water dragons that lived there.
The staff were so polite and helpful from the moment we arrived.
There are food trucks most nights if you don’t want to cook, and in easy walking distance to the beaches, cafes, and shops.
Perfect spot for a holiday by the ocean

Returned for another stay at Kirra Beach Caravan Park.
Having to cancel in September with a family emergency, I was given a credit - not many parks will do that. So thank you to the managers.
The facilities are good. Great atmosphere around the park. The staff are always absolutely fantastic.

Kirra Beach Tourist Park is unique, in that it has lots of open spaces with lovely shady trees; lots of the caravan sites are a single row without caravans backing up to them, and they are spaced well enough that your vehicle can be parked beside your annex. The facilities are clean with the best equipped laundries you will find, and the staff keep the BBQ's clean and shiny.
Location is a big plus. It is close to the beach with access to lots off restaurants, and the main Cooloongatta shopping centre is just over the hill. North and South access via the highway is only a few hundred metres away. We have been coming here for years and will not look anywhere else at that end of the coast.

Our family just stayed at Kirra Beach Tourist Park for 6 nights, and we had a lovely stay. When we checked in, the ladies in the office were very helpful and let us know what was happening in the park and the Coolangatta area while we were staying. Absolutely fantastic service.
The van sites are a really good size and good spacing with a large open area for camping. The amenities were in good condition, a good size and well located in the park. The playground, jumping pillow, and pool were a great distraction for the kids when we weren't at the beach.
Great spot.

We recently stayed at this wonderful park. We have 2 little fur babies that mean the world to us and they were made to feel welcome as much as we were. The staff are friendly and helpful and respectful. The grounds are kept immaculate. Cannot talk more highly of this park.
A great spot not far to walk or cycle to Kirra, and the morning wake-up calls from the parrots and kookaburras was awesome....
We have spent many months staying at the Kirra caravan park. It’s our home away from home. It’s in a great location and very easy to get to just off the motorway.
We had a great stay in our camper trailer, toilets and showers were very clean and the staff were friendly.

Great dog friendly good size sites could do with hand towels in amenities blocks as hand blowers are old slow style dated need updating and hand towels installed pool is good but not well maintained and sparkling also needs more garbage bins, good clean BBQS with cleaning products supplied inc hand towels.

We had to find a pet friendly caravan park to stay at while we were visiting Tweed Heads for a gig this week. Really happy we found Kirra Beach Tourist Park, who were super friendly in helping us get our accommodation sorted. Nice tree lined sites offering shade. Clean amenities block and good sized sites.
The whole process was simple and we got sorted straight away. Super close to Kirra Beach and also to Coolangatta and all the beaches there.

We had an idea staying near the airport would be a mistake. 6x flights at 6am sat and 4 flights at 6am Sunday, plus all throughout the day - ambiance destroyed. Staff friendly and ammenities clean. The grass near our toilet block had not been mowed for at least 2 weeks and bindies everywhere. Also a mountain of leaves at the entries to both M & F toilets - perhaps vacuum them instead of blowing them, only for them to return the next day? We won't be returning.

Nice leafy campsite a few hundred metres from the Kirra Beach oceanfront. I needed to get my long run done before the Queenstown half marathon and running along the ocean path from Rainbow Bay to Currumbin was great!
The park has great facilities and was nice and quiet.

Park needs updating. A lot of the slab sites have no grass and is either sand or mud when it rains. Sites are under trees so you will need to wash your roll out awning and top of van. Path from 1 of the toilet blocks leads no where.  There are no kerbs or drainage in the park. Water just lays on the roads after it rains. Toilets seem to be cleaned at peak usage times. Not ideal. Park isn't close to water or shops so you need to drive everywhere. Park in general just looks untidy.
This is a caravan park. Boutique in size and very Clean. Ideally situated.

I find the location at Kirra is simply the best, close to coffee shops, restaurants in the area. You are a short drive to Northern NSW and all it has to offer to tourists. The amenities are very clean and the staff are very helpful and all seem happy to see you as a customer. The Caravan sites are spacious and the park is kept tidy by ground staff. Although the Park is close to the Coolangatta Airport  the plane noise was not a problem.

We stayed in a cabin whilst at Kirra Beach Tourist Park. The cabin was immaculately clean location was perfect as you could walk to the beach or go to the park pool. Service from the staff from the time we arrived until our departure was fantastic.  A great place to stay we will be back.
Excellent caravan park.  Very welcoming of our dog as well.  Great amenities and lovely staff.

Stayed for a night on a lovely unpowered site. Very helpful receptionist.
Big plus for the best and cleanest amenities i've seen so far in australia!
Recommend!

6 days(mid October)at a great park. Spotless amenities, awesome camp kitchen and entertainment areas, big sites with good access. Cleani g crews daily, who were always happy and engaging. The pizza and fish n chip vans were a great treat. Will definitely be back again.
Lovely caravan park. Really friendly and helpful staff. Close to beach and lots of eateries. We liked it so much we extended our stay

Recently spent 4 Nights here, All staff were lovely and helpful. Amenties were probably some of the cleanest we have come across in our travels. Will definetly recommend to family and friends,willalso be using their services again in the future

Great park to stay at.  Staff were very friendly and amenities always kept in order.  Kids were kept very occupied between the jumping pillow, playground, pool and of course the beautiful beach just a short walk away.  I also enjoyed a good 10k run up the beautiful esplanade for the sunrise.  Delicious cafes and good shopping too.

Each year we love to go back with our pet dog to Kirra beach caravan park.The slab powered site is generously good size. The amenities are spotless when they are cleaned every day, the grass is cut and kept under control and the pool is always sparkling. Soon you walk in the office the staffs are wonderful they welcome you with open arms and lovely smile all around plus they give you a complimentary free dog wash token on arrival. We truly love camping there every year it’s handy to big shops, cafés & eateries.
Thank you Kirra Beach caravan park will see you next year as usual.

Kirra Tourist Park was a great place to take the family for our first family camping trip. The factories were so clean and got cleaned often. The showers were great with nice warm water and great water pressure. The camp grounds were amazing and where we were camping in the middle by the grass area was perfect for the kids to kick a ball and ride their bikes. Pool was nice and big. The location is also good, only 10min walk to the beach, restaurants and shops. The only negative is it very close to the airport so you do hear the aeroplanes taking off. But all in all great place and will definitely stay again.
Very poor tv reception only SBS and nitv after talking to other campers around the area the same deal not good in this day and age

I had 4 very enjoyable days at Kirra Beach and was impressed by the size of the sites. The staff were very obliging, even delivering my 9kg gas refill back to my motorhome. There was lots of lovely shade, plenty of grass and the Amenities block was excellent. Plenty of clothes lines too! (and even irons & ironing boards, so I could press my outfit for the wedding I was attending). I would definitely come back to stay here.  Thanks Team Kirra
Stayed 2 nights to visit relatives, great location
Stayed 4 nights. Big park well equipped but busy. Facilities all good. Roomy sites.

We really enjoyed our stay.  our room in the lodge was very clean & comfortable. The amenities were very clean & adequate. The camp kitchen was only a step away & very well catered for.  The park had a lovely friendly atmosphere & all the staff were very friendly & accommodating. We are very happy to recommend to future travelers & hope to stay again in the future.

We had a lovely stay here in June. Dog friendly, fully self-contained cabin including full kitchen with everything you need for a short or long-term stay, dishwasher, 2 bedrooms, secure enclosed balcony with a gate, balcony has an electric BBQ,  10/10 for cleanliness.
Highly Recommend. ✨️
Gepflegter Camping mit schönen Zeltplätzen. Er liegt etwas ausserhalb, ist dafür auch etwas günstiger als andere Parks.

We just had a forth stay in our caravan
Staff were extremely friendly and helpful
Amenities were spotless
Park itself is well maintained and very tidy

Returned for another stay at Kiera Beach caravan park, the facilities and great atmosphere along with the staff were absolutely fantastic.
Staff on-site are so helpful and nothing is a problem for them, they are always up for a chat and provide you with great advise as what you can do.
We stayed in a 1 bedroom cabin, the presentation is slightly dated, but very comfortable, and has everything you would want inside, it is also very quiet which is fantastic. The pool area is always presented well and lots of families were really enjoying themselves.
Lots of vans and people who were really enjoying there stay, with activities put on by the staff such as face painting.
Really recommend this place for couples and families as you will have a great time. Single travellers will enjoy this stop as well, and you will meet new friends along the way
Lady who took our booking could not of been more friendly or helpful .
Good park

Great place to relax and unwind. Always have the best time here and met some really nice people. Friends from Sydney flew up to spend the night and they can't stop talking about how relaxed this place is. Already booked for the October long weekend.
We stayed recently for 4 days and found this park to be awesome. The staff were exceptional in assisting us & very friendly!! Would definitely stay here again.

We love this park. Friendly staff, fantastic new managers. Keep you informed about what is happening in the park. Location great, walking distance to beach and shops. Amenities cleaned three times a day. (We now love the the heritage listed paperbark trees 😉)

Lovely to stay in pet friendly accommodation that doesn't just allow pets but actually welcomes them. This led to there being a very pleasant and relaxed feel about Kirra Beach Tourist Park which we enjoyed. Facilities all maintained (lovely pool), staff super friendly and for us a perfect and quiet location.
Next year already booked.

My wife and I stay here regularly on our Qld caravan trips.
The staff are amazing, the facilities clean and the location one of best kept secrets  of the Gold Coast
Had our caravan, sites were a good size, park not packed out, only issue was planes taking off from GC airport early morning until late at night straight over the top of us. Staff were friendly.

Great caravan park with reasonable fees for sites. Clean, good amenities, spacious sites, good communication from management when functions were scheduled or issues arose. Great location. Airport noise did not worry us at all. Happy campers. Highly recommend. Many thanks.

Great clean park with excellent amenities and helpful friendly staff also bonus dog friendly. They also  are small business friendly and have pizza vans and fish and chip vans onsite on different nights.

Great Caravan Park for everyone.  Pool was heated to a perfect temperature in August, kids play area great. Shower block clean and tidy. Sites big and roomy. Quiet at night. Staff very friendly and helpful. Loved the bird life too!

I would not recommend this caravan park at all.
Our site we were put on was terrible and right down the back amongst permanent residents who were SMOKING and playing LOUD music all night.

The service was terrible we asked to be put on another site apparently they were fully booked for the weekend and couldn’t but yet there were sites empty for the whole duration of the time we were there.
We were then told someone was going to come down and look at our site as we had a tree sticking out at the back of the site which took more space away from our side as we could not back in far enough and no one came down.

Park is very run down and will not be back!
Extremely disappointing

Pretty disappointed. Booked 2 weeks in advance. 3 days prior to check in I noticed there will be 45 mm rain on my arrival day and almost the same for the next day, called them to cancel and they said no refund and no credit.

Due to uneven slope at the front of site 2 we had difficulty un-hitching and hitching up the caravan, had to use a jack to get the Jockie wheel to lock into a safe position. A bit tedious and kept other patrons waiting to get out. Otherwise a great stay. Thanks.

13/8/2024 Much better site this stay, site 20, very happy (can't change the rainy weather).
Excellent park Excellent location Excellent staff we thoroughly enjoyed our stay would definitely stay there again

We spent a week at Kira Tourist Park and what a park it was. Awesome staff where nothing was a problem, a very safe park with security entry & exit. The experience was awesome, everyone we met at this park were extremely friendly & courteous. The park had nights where you could order your diner from a food truck then go pick it up, pizza, fish & chips. I cannot rate this park high enough, we will be staying there on our way home to WA.
It’s one of the best Tourist Parks we’ve stayed at and it’s very dog friendly.
We had an issue with our van and required a caravan plumber to come and replace a pump, no problem he pulls up mentions my name & he’s let in to do the repairs, no problem at all.
Thank you so much
Lyn & Erica WA
Amazing staff and park. The team are very helpful and the size of the sites is great.
Hard to top
Park is in a great position close to public transport. Cabin accommodation is great, very private overlooking the lake.  Staff are very helpful. Great heated pool!

We stayed at Kirra BeachTourist Park on a powered caravan site in early August 2024.  The location was great for us as we were attending a function at North Kirra.
The park staff were extremely helpful, courteous and friendly. We would definitely stay at this park again in the future.
Own caravan and as we stayed before the service and help by the staff hasn't  really changed and always prepared  to make your stay very enjoyable. Thank you Kirra tourist  Park. John and gayle.

Kirra tourist Park was the best park iI have been too for years most friendly staff always helpful ,all amenities kept amaculate , BBQ's ,campkitcen are all excellent . The grounds are shaded and also amaculate really made my stay enjoyable will be going back soon .Rob Fox

Fabulous park. It's dog friendly with big spacious sites and lots of green space. The amenities are spotless, staff friendly and a great location. Close to beautiful Kirra beach and local shops. Even though its close to airport its a quiet location and we weren't disturbed by planes at all. We loved our stay and would definitely stay again!
Have stayed here before and nothing has changed. From the very friendly++ humans on the front desk to the orsum accomodation for use and our Doggo. Highly recommended.

We recently had the pleasure of staying at Kirra Beach Tourist Park, and it was an absolutely fantastic experience! From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm hospitality and friendly smiles.

The park itself is beautifully maintained, with clean and well-kept facilities. The grounds are spacious, offering plenty of room for kids and dogs to play and for everyone to relax. The area we stayed in was spotless and well-equipped, providing all the comforts of home while being surrounded by the beauty of nature.

One of the highlights of our stay was the stunning location. Nestled in a picturesque setting, we enjoyed breathtaking views and easy access to beach walking trails and outdoor activities. It was the perfect escape from the hustle and bustle of daily life.

The amenities at Kirra Beach Tourist Park were top-notch. We loved the heated pool, which was perfect for a refreshing swim after a day of exploring. The convenience store had everything we needed for our stay.

The staff at Kirra Beach Tourist Park went above and beyond to ensure our visit was enjoyable. They were always available to answer questions, provide recommendations, and help with any requests we had.

Overall, our stay at Kirra Beach Tourist Park exceeded our expectations in every way. It’s a wonderful destination for families, couples and those travelling with their furry 4 legged friends. We can’t wait to return for another memorable getaway!

Thank you, Kirra Beach Tourist Park, for an unforgettable experience!

A lovely clean caravan park. Great facilities. Camp kitchen, playground, pool. Great for kids, dogs allowed, The only downfall is its so close to the airport so if you want a sleep in you won't get one. Staff were lovely and accomodating for a group to camp together.
Great caravan park within walking distance to the beach front at Coolangatta and Rainbow Bay.

We've been coming here for years as it is in a great location in a wonderful park of the world. Two blocks from the beaches and shops (and the Golf Coast Airport). However,  the park is now looking old and in needs of some TLC. The amenities seem original and in need of an update. Laundry facilities good. The sites are average, mostly slabs but old and some difficult to get on to. Bats/flying foxes are quite prevalent during the night (noisy and smelly) and the planes take off with gusto at 6.04 each morning. So you need to be a bit laid back to fully enjoy the location.

Very happy with our stay at the caravan park.
New management is friendly and professional, and the place is kept nice and tidy. Would highly recommend the place for its friendly and relaxed atmosphere.

We are currently travelling around Aus and have stayed at a lot of caravan parks. This one was very underwhelming as yes the park was very big and spacious it lacked a kitchen that was very useable with no oven or stove tops and was quite the distance from all camp sites so was a pain to carry everything over. Also, the staff were friendly enough but the other campers really ruined it for us as there were people who had their stuff absolutely everything and when telling the staff that their site was half on ours as well as them not picking up after their dogs, not to mention the smell the staff did absolutely nothing about. I won’t be coming back as for the price it’s not worth it!

Powered Site.
This is a great holiday park in a great position near the beach. The new managers are a breath of fresh air with some great ideas. Highly recommend.
Very quiet, great customer service.
Great cabins with spacious rooms and dog friendly cabins.

Customer service here SUCKS, super rude abrasive and not friendly.. find somewhere else, EDIT: non-guest is correct Scott, when your staff can't even smile and are simply just rude, when potential clients make enquiries, they do not become guests. Trying to gaslight potential clients calling them liars just proves my point of the contempt your staff and seemingly you also hold toward potential clients. Stay elsewhere.

We have been camping here at Kirra for over 10 years, we found this park by chance and have returned all these years for many reasons, the park is very open and spacious, the trees that surround the park are beautiful, the sites are large and with some being pet friendly it’s an extra bonus being able to bring our fur baby, the pool is large, and always clean, the facilities are always clean, with two large toilet blocks, with a games room , jumping pillow and small playground it’s very child friendly , the location is 10/10 walking distance to the beach and shops, yes it’s near an airport but you soon get use to the planes! But above all it’s the staff, Michelle especially is always so friendly and welcoming, the extra things they put on for the children are so special, seeing the children’s faces around the park as they got easter eggs from the easter bunny is one example! Keep up the fantastic work everyone, we really enjoy our time at your beautiful park x

Fantastic power site for camping with a super easy check-in online making it such an easy transition into the park.

Campsite a very spacious with maintained green grass.  Facilities are walking distances from your campsite.

We will definitely be coming back again

Reviewing a powered tent site. Sites were so close together and backed onto numerous other caravans and tents with near no personal space, and with rather questionable people staying beside us. Booked for 3 nights and stayed for 1. Didnt feel safe with the people that were beside us, and were advised by another camper that someone had stolen a car from the park the night earlier and broke the boom gate driving the stolen car out. Told our concerns to reception who didn't seem to care.
Planes flying over head are very loud since being positioned next to air port.
Park seemed nice however our experience wasn't. Wouldn't recommend for a tent.
Have stayed here a couple of times now and always a pleasure . Well maintained sites , great facilities , nice clean pool and great location. Will keep coming back .
Nothing but the best 👌 👍🏻 😍.  Parks in tip top shape. Facilities are immaculate. Management are brilliant. Love it here. 5 stars.

Visited friends whom were staying there.   Lovely place.  Very close to Coolangatta airport so have a lot of aircraft noise starting very early in the morning.   But fabulous location in walking distance to all amenities and beaches.
Stayed here in our caravan. Lovely clean park. Friendly staff.  Good atmosphere.  5 minutes walk to beach 10 minutes walk to surf club.

Efficient and well run facility. Common areas cleaned regularly. Even with some heavy rain, park didn’t get too soggy and concrete slaps drained well. Sites are fairly decent size. Food trucks over Xmas period were nice. Automated pin and checkin was fantastic
Just let me have my walk please I’m from the other side Coolangatta I walked in the exercise i’m from the Ocean Plaza sometimes I get stressed out it says I was here 4years ago

Stayed at Kirra Caravan Park for $70 per night and felt that the site we stayed on was about 3inch deep in leaves, hadn't been mowed and very dirty.  Branches falling on caravan roof.  We are not allowed into park now until 11am so why aren't they mowed and cleaned like the good old days.  Also no WiFi available.  Getting more expensive with less services.  Very dissatisfied.

We always stay here when on the Gold Coast, pet friendly, Michelle in office is really happy friendly & helpful, short walk to beach/cafes/restaurants, gets a little pricey peak season/school holidays but that’s understandable
Great park, great staff, great facilities

Site: average size, yet clean and well kept.

Staff: fantastic, positive and easy to engage.

Location: so close to some of the worlds best beaches. Easy to get north and south on the high way. Tucked away from the traffic.

Showers: the worst I’ve experience in 9 months of travel. No pressure. Temperature capped. Probably not an issue for travellers in the weekend. But in comparison to the 23 other parks I’ve stayed at this year, these are #23 on the list.

Notes. Small park for the kids and heated pool are nice additions.

Should allow bookings for 1 night on a late standby basis for unpowered TENT sites. Plenty of availability, just ridiculous.
Clowns missed out on my money and Nobby beach got it instead
Amazing spot very clean amenities love love love
Lovely park in a fabulous location.
Great park, excellent facilities.
Great park,loved the heated pool,
Great site excellent  friendly service

0 customer service, sent site map & codes to ph direct your self to site. The worst site in the park hose and water connections so far away our leads & hose couldn’t reach. Asked for help was told sorry no other sites available but there was at least half a dozen sites still vacant the following day which we could have been swapped too and never even tried to fix the issue which I’m sure they were aware of because we would not of been the first people to tell them. After spending a ridiculous $78 a night for a powered site we couldn’t even access  we had to go to Bunnings and spend $120 on more leads & hoses just to reach. Under the biggest tree in the park that dropped nuts on the roof all night &  unable to put the awning out if we wanted to park the car,  not happy and won’t be back or recommend this caravan park.

Well managed/organised most professional caravan park around, especially in cleaning/maintaining amenities which l appreciate for such a busy spot!

Hear every jetplane til 10pm but otherwise quiet and an easy walk to huge beach & shops.
Very pleasant park even though it was full for the holidays. Good large sites, modern amenities, fabulous location. Seems to absorb a huge number of children without fuss!
Very convenient spot. Amenities were clean, well cared for.  Staff were exceptionally pleasant and helpful. Positive experience would happily return.

We stayed on a dog friendly camping site and we have done so in 2019 as well. Kirra Beach tourist park is an amazing place for both the kids and dogs. The friendly staff organized so many family friendly activities and the range of food vans definitely added to the overall experience. The park is within walking distance to the beach and we felt extremely safe and at ease here compared to other parks. Our friends stayed in a lodge and it was clean and included everything that they needed for their stay. The sites were of substantial size and the whole park had a wonderful layout with beautiful gardens. The clean amenities and sites were also a contributing factor. The staff were always ready to help with a smile. Would recommend and a well deserved 5 stars! Thanks to the staff for a wonderful holiday!!

Nice clean cabin. Needed more rubbish bags and pegs. Playground and pool not the greatest for toddlers, had to leave park for them.  Awesome that cabin didn't have bunk beds... no stress with active toddlers

This caravan parks reception does NOT give accurate information and had us drive 6 hours saying dogs are allowed and no more info will be needed on them, just to get there and tell us dogs need vax certificates (our girl is 15 years old we definitely don’t have her certs on us). I would not recommend going there. None of this info was needed from us until they seen us come in with tattoos. It’s 2023. Come on. Absolutely disgusting form.

We took a dog friendly cabin for two nights on our trip down to Melbourne and it was perfect.  The deck was fully enclosed so we could sit outside and not have to worry about him wondering off.  Great atmosphere with people walking their dogs and having a chat and walking distance to the beach.
Loved our stay and would certainly recommend to our friends. Thanks Team 😊

We stayed a night on unpowered site. We chose it as it is closed to the beach in walking distance.  During the day there is nose from the planes taking off. Some may like to see the airplanes taking off. At night gets quiet.

The shower and toilet facilities are small, only one shower and two toilets for male toilets and the same for female toilets. The kitchen is large though.

There are lovely paper bark trees and is pet friendly.
Ytb
Great caravan park.Lots of lovely big trees  &  grass Clean & tidy. Well looked after.
Great Park with a nice warm pool in winter.n
Great caravan/camping spot, great amenities
Great location!
Hair volt
Great caravan park

Lovely staff, great park.
Super friendly to dogs.
Awesome staff, too willing to help out
$36 for a piece of fish, 3 crumbed prawns and chips...too expensive. Cramped sites and way too many birds that mess on your car and van. Stinking men's toilet.

Great people sites spotless park clean we’re doing maintenance while there
Great showers huge laundry
Lots of space between each other friendly caravaners
Good walk to shops near by
Great park but why do they put prices up because a festival is on.

We were in our caravan. A nice place. Price was good. Woodfired Pizza for dinner, Tuesday night.
Price was good. Nice flavour. Our daughter used the pool, heated. Makes a difference.
Cheerful Front Desk....Everything was Close...Food Area..Showers etc...Clean...Slept in 4x4...Lucky for Me & Others...No Rain!

Muy felices con nuestra estadía que comenzó siendo de una noche y se extendió a 3. Instalaciones muy limpia. Pileta climatizada. Baños con duchas de agua caliente. El personal muy amable y simpático 😊
Great place close to a few shops a chemist 7 eleven and the beach !! Dogs are not allowed on beach
So far so good. Easy check on roomy sites.
